title: Mobile menu — full-screen split layout with WebGL model
description: Redesign mobile menu as full-screen overlay with split layout. Left: interactive WebGL octahedron model (from OctahedronHero). Right: Fractal logo, blurb text ('we believe small groups who share context deeply & build agentic tools for each other can move dramatically faster than individuals working alone, so We embrace experimentation, joyful cyborgism & fun-first collaboration to solve problems together with friends.'), nav links with Jacquard first-letter styling and elegant palette colors. White/cream background. Reference: Monumental Labs style split menu.
